creator: vendion@gmail.com
text: That is very odd as in the poudriere build jail's working directory it does look like the patch did apply, but there is something else going on that is causing the patch step to fail as I see the following files for setup.py: setup.py, setup.py.orig, setup.py.rej. The contents of setup.py.orig matches https://github.com/Anorov/PySocks/blob/master/setup.py while setup.py looks like that with the patch correctly applied. I don't know if it is a problem with the port or with poudiere itself.
